subject: Mathematics
activityTitle: M ETHOD   OF   C ONSTRUCTION 1. Paste three graph sheets on a hardboard and draw two mutually perpendicular
objective:
To obtain truth values of compound
statements of the type   p   q ∨   by using
switch connections in parallel.
Switches, electric wires, battery and
lamp/bulb.

discussion:
Same activity can be used to verify
the result that the slope of the tangent
at a point is equal to the value of the
derivative at that point for other
curves.
N OTE
The activity may be repeated
by taking point (4, 3) on first
sheet, (0, 4) on second sheet
and (1, 4) on the third sheet.
